title: Babicka
writer: Bozena Nemcová, Karel Hasler, Frantisek Cáp
actors: Terezie Brzková, Svetla Svozilová, Karel Tresnák
plot: "Grandmother" is a highly romanticized autobiographical novel by a Czech 19th century writer, Bozena Nemcova. It's a classical, compulsory reading in Czech schools, about a wise, working-class woman, happier in her simplicity and ...
